transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Sarah Johnson. I'm calling because my sump pump has low water pressure. Dispatcher: Hi Sarah, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Kohler, an older one, 15 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 7 River Road. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out Saturday between 10 and 12. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.issue: sump pump has low water pressure
expected_entities.equipment: Kohler sump pump, an older one, 15 years
